embed.title: 🚨 Report an Issue
embed.description:
Have you encountered a problem, bug, or concern on this server?

Use the button below to open a **private ticket** with our staff team. All reports are handled confidentially and taken seriously.

**You should report:**
• Rule violations or user misconduct
• Incorrect or misleading IELTS information
• Technical issues or bugs
• Any other concerns about the server
embed.footer: IELTS Server • All reports are confidential
